title: wrightia pubescens subsp. laniti
intro: Wrightia pubescens subsp. laniti, also known as Wrightia lanii, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Wrightia lanii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and alleviate pain. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine preparations.
